heading: Arto contra-cyclic lane stabilizes as mechanics-first dynamic geometry prior art with Sixto twin-circle bridge
text:
type: observation
tags: [qa, arto-heino, contra-cyclic, dynamic-geometry, external-prior-art]
body: Built `arto_contra_cyclic_lane.json` and `build_arto_contra_cyclic_lane.py` from `arto_intake_batch_001.json`. The lane now has 4 stable items and 3 quarantined claims. Stable: (1) the article should be read as a mechanics-first dynamic-geometry packet rather than a theorem source, (2) the Sixto Ramos sentence is the concrete reconstruction hook because it ties the machine to Archimedean twin circles, Fibonacci/golden geometry, toroidal geometry, and the conchoid of de Sluze family, (3) the article gives a real QA-adjacent terminology bridge across QA, Great Pyramid geometry, versin/haversin, toroids, pendulums, and Huygens-style curves, and (4) it proposes a staged spherical-rotating-pendulum typology for the new branch. Quarantined: broad historical priority claims, missing equation layer, and sacred-geometry/crop-circle rhetoric. Honest verdict: this is now a usable prior-art lane, and the next substantive extraction target should be the Sixto Ramos / Archimedean twin-circle mechanics.
